signals.reason: Bansko enters a shoulder season in September, dropping premium rates while keeping full family infrastructure active (indoor pools, kids' clubs). As a Tier 1 local drive from Plovdiv (< 2 hours), this avoids flight friction. The property is specifically optimized for 4-year-olds with specialized kids' areas, high safety ratings, and year-round spa facilities that remain fully operational.

Velingrad is the 'Spa Capital of the Balkans' and less than 1.5 hours from Plovdiv. September provides a price trough before the autumn wellness peak. This 5-star property maintains high-utility thermal pools and kids' infrastructure, offering a luxury experience at off-peak rates compared to the summer holiday surge.

Borovets in September drops to shoulder-season rates. Hotel Rila has a massive indoor heated pool, specialized kids' play area, and mountain lifts operating for easy hikes with a 4-year-old. Drive from Plovdiv is under 2 hours, presenting virtually zero travel friction.
